tips: 🐱 Good things take time... like a cat bath.
😸 Every bug is just a cat toy.
🐈 Ctrl+C is the cat's favorite shortcut.
💤 Not sleeping, just thinking with eyes closed.

hooks.command: echo $(date +%s) > /tmp/claude-session-start; echo ''; echo '  /\_/\  '; echo ' ( o.o ) '; echo '  > ^ <  Claude Code ready. Meow.'; echo ''

icon=$HOME/.claude/assets/icon.png; sound=$HOME/.claude/assets/meow.mp4; start=$(cat /tmp/claude-session-start 2>/dev/null || echo 0); now=$(date +%s); elapsed=$((now - start)); if [ $elapsed -gt 30 ]; then if [ -f "$icon" ]; then terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "✅ Task complete (${elapsed}s)" -contentImage "$icon" -sound Purr 2>/dev/null; else osascript -e 'display notification "✅ Task complete" with title "Claude Code 🐱" sound name "Purr"' 2>/dev/null; fi; [ "${PURRFECT_SOUND}" = "on" ] && { if [ -f "$sound" ]; then afplay -v 5.5 "$sound" 2>/dev/null; else say -v Yuna "냐옹" 2>/dev/null; fi; } || true; fi

icon=$HOME/.claude/assets/icon.png; sound=$HOME/.claude/assets/meow-waiting.mp4; tool=$(jq -r '.tool_name // "tool"'); if [ -f "$icon" ]; then terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "⚠️ Waiting for your approval — $tool" -contentImage "$icon" -sound Sosumi 2>/dev/null; else osascript -e "display notification \"⚠️ Waiting for your approval — $tool\" with title \"Claude Code 🐱\" sound name \"Sosumi\"" 2>/dev/null; fi; [ "${PURRFECT_SOUND}" = "on" ] && { if [ -f "$sound" ]; then afplay -v 2 "$sound" 2>/dev/null; else say -v Yuna "냐옹" 2>/dev/null; fi; } || true

icon=$HOME/.claude/assets/icon.png; sound=$HOME/.claude/assets/meow-error.mp3; tool=$(jq -r '.tool_name // "tool"'); if [ -f "$icon" ]; then terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "❌ Error in $tool" -contentImage "$icon" -sound Basso 2>/dev/null; else osascript -e "display notification \"❌ Error in $tool\" with title \"Claude Code 🐱\" sound name \"Basso\"" 2>/dev/null; fi; [ "${PURRFECT_SOUND}" = "on" ] && { if [ -f "$sound" ]; then afplay -v 5 "$sound" 2>/dev/null; else say -v Yuna "냐옹" 2>/dev/null; fi; } || true

icon=$HOME/.claude/assets/icon.png; sound=$HOME/.claude/assets/meow.mp4; msg=$(jq -r '.message // "Meow?"'); if [ -f "$icon" ]; then terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "🐾 $msg" -contentImage "$icon" -sound Purr 2>/dev/null; else osascript -e "display notification \"🐾 $msg\" with title \"Claude Code 🐱\" sound name \"Purr\"" 2>/dev/null; fi; [ "${PURRFECT_SOUND}" = "on" ] && { if [ -f "$sound" ]; then afplay -v 5.5 "$sound" 2>/dev/null; else say -v Yuna "냐옹" 2>/dev/null; fi; } || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then if [ -f './gradlew' ]; then ./gradlew classes -q 2>&1 || echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "컴파일 에러가 있습니다. 수정 후 커밋하세요."}'; elif [ -f './mvnw' ]; then ./mvnw compile -q 2>&1 || echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "컴파일 에러가 있습니다. 수정 후 커밋하세요."}'; fi; fi
